---
title: "Doctoral students who publish"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2013). Doctoral students who publish. *Doctoral Times*."
date: "2013-03-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_doctoral_2013"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Doctoral Times"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://www.sheffield.ac.uk/polopoly_fs/1.271737!/file/DoctoralTimes-Spring2013.pdf"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This piece examines the trends and challenges associated with early-career researchers publishing during their PhD studies. It discusses the impact of early publication on career progression and academic training."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Doctoral Times
**Year:** 2013

[URL](http://www.sheffield.ac.uk/polopoly_fs/1.271737!/file/DoctoralTimes-Spring2013.pdf) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This piece examines the trends and challenges associated with early-career researchers publishing during their PhD studies. It discusses the impact of early publication on career progression and academic training.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2013). Doctoral students who publish. *Doctoral Times*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_doctoral_2013,
	title = {Doctoral students who publish},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://www.sheffield.ac.uk/polopoly_fs/1.271737!/file/DoctoralTimes-Spring2013.pdf},
	abstract = {This piece examines the trends and challenges associated with early-career researchers publishing during their PhD studies. It discusses the impact of early publication on career progression and academic training.},
	journal = {Doctoral Times},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = mar,
	year = {2013},
	pages = {6},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
